postReview.title: Switzerland 2-0 Italy: Vargas scores stunner as holders crash out of Euro 2024
postReview.description: Switzerland produced a brilliant performance in the last 16 at Euro 2024, ending Italy's reign with a 2-0 win at the Olympiastadion.
